side_effects.description: Mixture became cloudy and gel-like substance after approximately 5 seconds when Semaglutide (2.5 mg in 0.3 ml) mixed with Kisspeptin-10 (0.25 mg in 0.15 ml); gray color observed; adding extra 0.1-0.2 ml of reconstitution water did not resolve

protocol_notes: Attempted mixing Semaglutide with Kisspeptin-10 due to insufficient syringes while on vacation. Has successfully mixed other non-GLP-1 peptides. Observational report on mixture incompatibility; injection not detailed as completed.
